column1: # Adjust severity levels based on known false positives
# Info leakage via headers — WARN (nginx removes Server header)
# Cookie without SameSite — WARN (handled in Django settings)
# CSP issues — WARN (we have a strict CSP via middleware)
# Anti-clickjacking — WARN (X-Frame-Options=DENY set in Django + Nginx)
# Missing HSTS — IGNORE (set via Nginx HSTS header)
# Timestamp disclosure — IGNORE (not sensitive in API context)
